creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
Herrie's website address has also been changed. The following patch
updates the website adress in the pkg-descr:

--- audio/herrie/pkg-descr	Thu Aug 31 14:12:05 2006
+++ audio/herrie/pkg-descr	Fri Apr 13 12:25:30 2007
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@
 It also supports submission of songs to AudioScrobbler. This makes it an
 ideal application for low-end jukeboxes.
  
-WWW: http://g-rave.nl/projects/herrie/
+WWW: http://herrie.info/

Yours,
-- 
 Ed Schouten <ed@fxq.nl>
 WWW: http://g-rave.nl/
